name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-20
title: contract.md still describes deleted --bug/--backlog dispatch flags
description: docs/spec/contract.md line 35 describes dispatch-tdd-subagent.py stdin as 'feature-name as $1, request-description as $2; optional flags: --bug <bug-dir>, --backlog <item-dir>'. This is the OLD interface — both --bug and --backlog were removed (replaced with --linked-item/--item-type per spec Inv 12) and the positional feature-name/request-description args don't exist either (--scope/--spec are required). contract.md is stale and misleads consumers reading the boundary contract.
